_note: Verify card names and counts against your physical copy. Edit this file to match.

info.title: Adventurer's Guide
info.subtitle: How to use this companion app with DungeonQuest.

items.text: Tap any deck on the left to draw a card. The card appears in the Active Card area.
Read the card and follow its instructions. Use the buttons below to Keep it, Discard it, or Draw Another.
Cards you keep are added to your Inventory — items, allies, and boons you currently hold. Tap any inventory card to use it.  Hand the physical card to the player who should hold it.
Discarded cards go to each deck's discard pile. When a deck is empty, tap ↺ to reshuffle the discard pile and continue.
Adventure Book — Use for setting up the quest, reading story text, and resolving special instructions.
Cards — Use this app to manage and draw from the various decks.
Miniatures, Tiles & Tokens — Use your miniatures, tiles and tokens on the board as normal to represent heroes, monsters, and game state.
Health — Track your physical health on your chosen player sheet as normal.
Use the combat cards, or even better, the solo combat rules with dice.
Dice — Use physical dice for skill checks, combat, and other rolls as described in the rules.

decks.name: Dungeon Deck
decks.description: Chambers and encounters drawn as you explore Dragonfire Dungeon.

cards.name: Razorwing Attack
cards.description: Roll 1 die and suffer a number of wounds equal to the result.

cards.name: Passage Down
cards.description: Place a catacomb entrance marker on this chamber.

cards.name: Hidden Trap
cards.description: Draw a trap card.

cards.name: Torch Goes Out
cards.description: Keep this card. While you have this card, test luck at the start of your status phase. If you succeed, you relight your torch, discard this card and take your turn. If you fail, end your turn.

cards.name: Ceiling Collapses
cards.description: The ceiling gives way! Some paths are blocked by debris, while other new paths are revealed. Rotate the chamber tile you are in 90 degrees clockwise.

cards.name: Dead Adventurer
cards.description: You may loot the body for treasure. If you choose to do so, draw 1 corpse card.

cards.name: Ambush
cards.description: Encounter a monster.

cards.name: Unstable Potion
cards.description: You may discard the potion at the start of your status phase and roll 2 dice: 2) You die. 3-5) Suffer 4 wounds. 6-7) Nothing happens. 8-10) Heal up to 3 wounds. 11-12) Heal all of your wounds.

cards.name: Gold Coins (30g)
cards.description: 30 gold coins.

cards.name: Shuffle
cards.description: Discard this card. Then, shuffle the dungeon deck and the dungeon discard pile together. Finally, draw a card from the dungeon deck and resolve it.

cards.name: Crypt
cards.description: You may explore the crypt for treasure. If you choose to do so, draw 1 crypt card.

cards.name: Empty
cards.description: The room is empty; nothing happens.

cards.name: Lingering Shade
cards.description: Keep this card. While you have this card, roll 2 dice at the start of your status phase. 2-3) You die. 4-12) Take your turn as normal. Discard this card if you enter the catacombs or cast Dragonfire Dungeon.

cards.name: Gold Coins (40g)
cards.description: 40 gold coins.

cards.name: Bottle Imp
cards.description: If you exit Dragonfire Dungeon, you may roll 1 die at the end of the game: 1-3) Discard one of your other loot cards at random. 4-6) Draw a treasure card.

cards.name: Secret Door
cards.description: You may immediately move to any adjacent space. If the space is unexplored, place a chamber as normal. If you encounter a monster, you cannot escape.

cards.name: Curse of the Wizard
cards.description: Roll 1 die and rotate all corridor tiles in the following direction: 1-2) 90 degrees clockwise 3-4) 180 degrees 5-6) 90 degrees counterclockwise.

decks.name: Door Deck
decks.description: Resolve when you attempt to pass through a door.

cards.name: Door Jammed
cards.description: The door does not open; remain in your current chamber.

cards.name: Spear Trap
cards.description: Roll 1 die and suffer a number of wounds equal to the result; remain in your current chamber.

cards.name: Door Opens
cards.description: The door opens; move into the adjacent chamber.

cards.name: Shuffle
cards.description: Discard this card. Then, shuffle the door deck and the door discard pile together. Finally, draw a card from the door deck and resolve it.

decks.name: Search Deck
decks.description: Drawn when you search a chamber for hidden things.

cards.name: Hidden Trap
cards.description: Draw a trap card.

cards.name: Giant Centipede
cards.description: Roll 2 dice, add their results and suffer a number of wounds equal to this total.

cards.name: Spider's Venom
cards.description: You are bitten by a spider. While you are in the catacombs, roll 1 die at the start of your status phase: 1-2) Suffer 1 wound. 3-6) Nothing happens.

cards.name: Gold Coins (150g)
cards.description: 150 gold coins.

cards.name: Gold Coins (70g)
cards.description: 70 gold coins.

cards.name: Gold Coins (60g)
cards.description: 60 gold coins.

cards.name: Gold Coins (10g)
cards.description: 10 gold coins.

cards.name: Shuffle
cards.description: Discard this card. Then, shuffle the search deck and the search discard pile together. Finally draw a card from the search deck and resolve it.

cards.name: Ferrox
cards.description: Roll 1 die; the result is the ferrox's life value. Then, test strength. If you succeed, the ferrox loses 1 life. If you fail, suffer 1 wound. Continue testing strength until the ferrox's life value reaches 0 or until you die.

cards.name: Unstable Potion
cards.description: You may discard the potion at the start of your status phase and roll 2 dice: 2) You die. 3-5) Suffer 4 wounds. 6-7) Nothing happens. 8-10) Heal up to 3 wounds. 11-12) Heal all of your wounds.

cards.name: Secret Door
cards.description: You may immediately move to any adjacent space. If the space is unexplored, place a chamber as normal. If you encounter a monster, you cannot escape.

cards.name: Passage Down
cards.description: Place a catacomb entrance marker on this chamber.

cards.name: Empty
cards.description: The room is empty; nothing happens.

decks.name: Crypt Deck
decks.description: Drawn when you choose to explore a crypt for treasure.

cards.name: Gold Coins (250g)
cards.description: 250 gold coins.

cards.name: Gold Coins (120g)
cards.description: 120 gold coins.

cards.name: Gold Coins (90g)
cards.description: 90 gold coins.

cards.name: Gold Coins (20g)
cards.description: 20 gold coins.

cards.name: Hidden Trap
cards.description: Draw a trap card.

cards.name: Empty
cards.description: The crypt is empty; nothing happens.

cards.name: Spectral Storm
cards.description: You are assailed by an army of undead. Test Strength. If you fail, suffer a number of wounds equal to half your remaining health (rounded up).

cards.name: Unstable Potion
cards.description: You may discard the potion at the start of your status phase and roll 2 dice: 2) You die. 3-5) Suffer 4 wounds. 6-7) Nothing happens. 8-10) Heal up to 3 wounds. 11-12) Heal all of your wounds.

cards.name: Old Bones
cards.description: Roll 1 die: 1-3) Nothing happens. 4-6) The bones spring to life and attack you. You encounter a monster. During this encounter, you cannot escape.

cards.name: Shuffle
cards.description: Discard this card. Then, shuffle the crypt deck and the crypt discard pile together. Finally draw a card from the crypt deck and resolve it.

decks.name: Corpse Deck
decks.description: Drawn when you loot a fallen adventurer.

cards.name: Unstable Potion
cards.description: You may discard the potion at the start of your status phase and roll 2 dice: 2) You die. 3-5) Suffer 4 wounds. 6-7) Nothing happens. 8-10) Heal up to 3 wounds. 11-12) Heal all of your wounds.

cards.name: Shuffle
cards.description: Discard this card. Then, shuffle the corpse deck and the corpse discard pile together. Finally, draw a card from the corpse deck and resolve it.

cards.name: Gold Coins (200g)
cards.description: 200 gold coins.

cards.name: Gold Coins (100g)
cards.description: 100 gold coins.

cards.name: Old Bones
cards.description: Roll 1 die: 1-3) Nothing happens. 4-6) The bones spring to life and attack you. You encounter a monster. During this encounter, you cannot escape.

cards.name: Rope
cards.description: When you resolve a "Trapdoor" or "Hole in the Roof" card or a Bottomless Pit chamber, you may discard this card to automatically succeed in your attribute test.

cards.name: Empty
cards.description: This corpse possesses nothing of value; nothing happens.

cards.name: Small Scorpion
cards.description: Roll 1 die, subtract 2 from the result, and suffer that many wounds.

cards.name: Gold Coins (50g)
cards.description: 50 gold coins.

cards.name: Deadly Scorpion
cards.description: Roll 1 die and suffer a number of wounds equal to the result.

cards.name: Scorpion
cards.description: Roll 1 die, subtract 1 from the result, and suffer that many wounds.

decks.name: Catacomb Deck
decks.description: Drawn each turn while you wander the catacombs beneath the dungeon.

cards.name: Sorcerer's Bolt
cards.description: A sorcerer hurls a magic bolt in your direction! Test luck. If you succeed, end your turn. If you fail, suffer a number of wounds equal to the amount by which you failed.

cards.name: Gigantic Diamond
cards.description: Loot card showing a gigantic diamond worth 4,000 gold.

cards.name: Giant Naga
cards.description: The passage is blocked by a giant naga and you must turn around. Follow the procedure for exiting the catacombs. Then, place your adventurer in that space and rotate it 180 degrees. Discard this card and all of your catacomb cards.

cards.name: Treasure Chest
cards.description: When you cast Dragonfire Dungeon, roll 2 dice. The chest has a gold value equal to the result multiplied by 100.

cards.name: Demon Flame
cards.description: A demon bursts forth in a ball of flame! Test luck. You cannot discard determination tokens to pass this test. If you succeed, suffer 1 wound. If you fail, suffer 5 wounds.

cards.name: Troll Smash
cards.description: A troll swings his mighty club directly at you! Test luck. If you succeed, end your turn. If you fail, subtract your armor value from 10 and suffer that many wounds.

cards.name: Hole in the Roof
cards.description: Test agility. If you succeed, you may exit the catacomb. If you fail, end your turn on your next turn; you may test agility again instead of drawing a catacomb card.

cards.name: Razorwing Attack
cards.description: Roll 1 die and suffer a number of wounds equal to the result.

cards.name: Hidden Trap
cards.description: Draw a trap card.

cards.name: Exit
cards.description: You have found a way out! You may immediately exit the catacombs.

cards.name: Empty
cards.description: The room is empty; nothing happens.

cards.name: Golem Grab
cards.description: A golem lunges at you out of the darkness, grabbing at your gear! Test luck. If you succeed, end your turn. If you fail, suffer 2 wounds and discard a loot card (if you have any).

cards.name: Shuffle
cards.description: Discard this card. Then, shuffle the catacomb deck and the catacomb discard pile together. Finally, draw a card from the catacomb deck and resolve it.

cards.name: Greedy Deep Elf
cards.description: A suspicious-looking deep elf beckons you near. You may discard 1 of your loot cards as a bribe. If you do, roll 1 die and multiply the result by 100. If this total is less than the gold value of the loot card you discarded, she shows you the way out and you may immediately exit the catacombs. If the total is higher, she betrays you! Suffer 4 wounds.

cards.name: Torch Goes Out
cards.description: While you are in the catacombs, test luck at the start of your status phase. If you succeed, you relight your torch; take your turn as normal. If you fail, end your turn.

cards.name: Skeleton Volley
cards.description: A group of skeletons launches a volley of arrows down the hall toward you! Test luck. If you succeed, end your turn. If you fail, draw 2 monster cards and suffer a number of wounds equal to the sum of the weapon penalties on both cards. Then, discard the cards.

cards.name: Spider's Venom
cards.description: You are bitten by a spider. While you are in the catacombs, roll 1 die at the start of your status phase: 1-2) Suffer 1 wound. 3-6) Nothing happens.

cards.name: Horde of Rats
cards.description: You are overwhelmed by a horde of verminous rats! Test armor. If you fail, suffer 4 wounds.

cards.name: Vampire Bite
cards.description: Test agility or armor (whichever is lower). If you fail, keep this card when you exit the catacombs. While you have this card, suffer 1 wound at the start of your status phase.

decks.name: Monster Deck
decks.description: Drawn whenever you encounter a monster in the dungeon or catacombs.

cards.name: Troll
cards.description: A hulking troll with knotted muscles and a stench of rot.

cards.name: Demon
cards.description: A burning fiend wreathed in flame and shadow.

cards.name: Sorceror
cards.description: A robed sorceror weaving cruel magics in the dark.

cards.name: Golem
cards.description: A stone construct, slow but devastating in its blows.

cards.name: Skeleton
cards.description: An undead warrior, brittle bones held together by malice.

decks.name: Trap Deck
decks.description: Resolve when a trap is triggered.

cards.name: Explosion
cards.description: Suffer 4 wounds and lose your next turn.

cards.name: Swinging Blade
cards.description: Test armor. If you fail, you die!

cards.name: Ceiling Collapses
cards.description: The ceiling gives way! Some paths are blocked by debris, while other new paths are revealed. Rotate the chamber tile you are in 90 degrees clockwise.

cards.name: Poisonous Snakes
cards.description: Roll 1 die, suffer a number of wounds equal to the result, and lose that many turns.

cards.name: Crossfire Trap
cards.description: Arrows fire from the walls. Test armor. If you fail, suffer a number of wounds equal to the amount by which you failed.

cards.name: Trapdoor
cards.description: Test agility. If you fail, suffer 1 wound and enter the catacombs.

cards.name: Shuffle
cards.description: Discard this card. Then, shuffle the trap deck and the trap discard pile together. Finally, draw a card from the trap deck and resolve it.

cards.name: Poisonous Gas
cards.description: Roll 1 die, subtract 3 from the result, and suffer that many wounds. Then, roll 1 die, subtract 3 from the result, and lose that many turns.

decks.name: Treasure Deck
decks.description: Loot cards drawn from the dragon's hoard.

cards.name: Chalice of Tamalir
cards.description: Gold value: 900.

cards.name: Artifact Eater
cards.description: If you exit the dungeon, roll 2 dice: 2-5) Discard one of your other loot cards at random. 6-12) This card has a gold value equal to the result of your roll multiplied by 100.

cards.name: Eyes of Avra
cards.description: Gold value: 420.

cards.name: Bag of Gems
cards.description: Gold value: 1,200.

cards.name: Pearl Ring
cards.description: Gold value: 130.

cards.name: Ruby Ring
cards.description: Gold value: 140.

cards.name: Vestments of Kellos
cards.description: Gold value: 600.

cards.name: Jeweled Chakra
cards.description: Gold value: 350.

cards.name: Ebon Amulet
cards.description: Gold value: 300.

cards.name: Flying Carpet
cards.description: Gold value: 500. When you resolve a Bridge or Bottomless Pit chamber, you may discard this card to automatically succeed at your skill test.

cards.name: Golden Claws
cards.description: Gold value: 290.

cards.name: Giant Ruby
cards.description: Gold value: 3,000.

cards.name: Obsidian Ring
cards.description: Gold value: 110.

cards.name: Ebon Ring
cards.description: Gold value: 80.

cards.name: Quicksilver Potion
cards.description: Gold value: 1,500. You may discard this card at the start of your turn to take 3 turns in a row before the next player takes his turn.

cards.name: Harp of Tranquility
cards.description: Gold value: 2,000. While you have this card, you must draw 2 dragon cards each time you draw a dragon card. You may discard this card at the start of any turn.

cards.name: Silver Ring
cards.description: Gold value: 160.

cards.name: Sun Spear
cards.description: Gold value: 1,100. If you also have the Staff of Light, this card has a gold value of 2,500.

cards.name: Loadstone
cards.description: Gold value: 1.

cards.name: Arcane Ring
cards.description: Gold value: 210.

cards.name: Crystal of Tival
cards.description: Gold value: 240.

cards.name: Gold Ring
cards.description: Gold value: 190.

cards.name: Crystal of Orris
cards.description: Gold value: 320.

cards.name: Charmer's Flute
cards.description: Gold value: 230.

cards.name: Belt of Strength
cards.description: Gold value: 260.

cards.name: Mirror of Shael
cards.description: Gold value: 550.

cards.name: Star of Kellos
cards.description: Gold value: 800.

cards.name: Forbidden Tome
cards.description: When you start your turn in the treasure chamber, roll 2 dice: 2-3) You die. 4-5) Roll 1 die and suffer a number of wounds equal to the result. 6-8) End your turn. 9-11) Draw 4 treasure cards. Keep 2 and discard the other 2. 12) Draw 3 treasure cards and then immediately exit the dungeon.

cards.name: Jinn Lamp
cards.description: Gold value: 270.

cards.name: Staff of Light
cards.description: Gold value: 700. If you have this card and the Sun Spear, this card has a gold value of 2,500.

cards.name: Rune Scarab
cards.description: Gold value: 400.

decks.name: Dragon Deck
decks.description: Drawn each turn you spend in the treasure chamber under Kalladra's gaze.

cards.name: Sleeping
cards.description: Draw 2 treasure cards. On your next turn, you may either exit the treasure chamber or stay and draw another dragon card.

cards.name: Dragon Rage
cards.description: Discard all of your treasure cards. Then, roll 2 dice and suffer a number of wounds equal to the result. Then, all other players in the treasure chamber suffer the effects described above. Finally, shuffle all discarded dragon cards (including this one) back into the dragon deck.

decks.name: Rune Deck
decks.description: Powerful runes — drawn or granted, then kept until used.

cards.name: Rune of Death
cards.description: Discard after you draw an 'Ambush' card. Discard the 'Ambush' card without resolving it.

cards.name: Rune of Insight
cards.description: Discard at the end of your action phase to discard all search tokens in your space and all spaces adjacent to your space.

cards.name: Stasis Rune
cards.description: Discard at the end of your status phase to take an additional turn at the end of this turn.

cards.name: Rune of Dragonfire
cards.description: Discard when you are about to draw a dragon card. Return all of the dragon cards to the deck and shuffle it.

cards.name: Life Drain Rune
cards.description: Discard after defeating a monster in combat. Heal all of your wounds.

cards.name: Rune of Transformation
cards.description: Discard after you draw a dungeon chamber to draw a second dungeon chamber. Shuffle one chamber back into the stack and place the other on the board as normal.

cards.name: Rune of Luck
cards.description: Discard after you fail an attribute test. The test automatically succeeds instead. Then, discard all of your determination tokens.

cards.name: Teleportation Rune
cards.description: Discard at the end of your status phase to move to any adjacent space and resolve its effects. If you encounter a monster, you cannot escape.

cards.name: Rune of Blinding
cards.description: Discard after you draw a search, crypt, or corpse card. Suffer 1 wound and discard the card without resolving it.

cards.name: Rune of Opening
cards.description: Discard at the end of your status phase to ignore all doors and portcullises during that turn.

cards.name: Rune of Healing
cards.description: Discard at the end of your status phase to heal up to 6 wounds.

cards.name: Rune of Vision
cards.description: Discard at the end of your status phase to draw 4 search cards, arrange them in any order you like, and return them to the top of the search deck.
